query:
UPDATE deals 
SET utmSource = JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(utmJson, '$.source')),
    utmMedium = JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(utmJson, '$.medium')),
    utmCampaign = JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(utmJson, '$.campaign')),
    utmTerm = JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(utmJson, '$.term')),
    utmContent = JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(utmJson, '$.content'))
WHERE utmJson IS NOT NULL AND utmJson != 'null';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Nn3NsgWfgWMEmv.e05a65be2af1 --database EKvcVicuVoUxTnzjSKzgdk --execute UPDATE deals 
SET utmSource = JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(utmJson, '$.source')),
    utmMedium = JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(utmJson, '$.medium')),
    utmCampaign = JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(utmJson, '$.campaign')),
    utmTerm = JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(utmJson, '$.term')),
    utmContent = JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(utmJson, '$.content'))
WHERE utmJson IS NOT NULL AND utmJson != 'null';
